personality: 1 iOS-Native Clean structure with 6 Glass / Luxe surfaces
personality_one_liner: A premium, cinematic expense and investment tracker blending iOS-native clarity with rich glassmorphism and deep botanical tones.

spacing.rule: Generous vertical breathing room. Cards fill horizontal space (100% width minus padding). Use sticky containers for bottom CTAs.

do's: Apply to sticky headers, bottom tab bar, floating FAB, and bottom-sheet drag handles.
Use as overlay on the Hero Balance Card paired with a tint and gradient scrim.
Ensure text on glass uses onSurfaceInverse or high contrast tokens.
dont's: Do not blur form fields or standard list rows.
Do not apply blur without a 70% tint layer underneath for readability.

screens.name: Home
screens.purpose: Dashboard providing a cinematic snapshot of net wealth, monthly cash flow, and quick actions.

states.empty: Should not be empty, defaults to 0 balance with onboarding tooltips.

screens.layout: Root is safe-area aware. Header with greeting and profile avatar. Hero Card (Total Balance) fills width, uses `images.hero_bg` underneath, covered by a vertical gradient scrim, then oversized 3xl typography. Below Hero: quick actions row (chips). Horizontal scrolling list for Investments Snapshot (sparklines). Recent Transactions (top 3) grouped by date. Floating FAB pinned at bottom right.

screens.name: Add Transaction
screens.purpose: Frictionless bottom sheet entry for income, expense, or investment with a beautiful glass handle.
screens.layout: BottomSheet root. Header segmented control (Expense/Income/Investment). Large amount input at `3xl`. Category grid of tinted `brandTertiary` rounded squares. Date and Note inputs. Sticky CTA Save button at the bottom avoiding keyboard.

screens.name: Transactions
screens.purpose: Comprehensive ledger with fast horizontal filtering.
screens.layout: Sticky Header with Search. Pinned Filter Row (scrolls horizontally behind glass header). List grouped by date (Today, Yesterday). Items: Tinted Icon, Title, Category, Amount (colored by type). Bottom padding accounts for Tab Bar.

screens.name: Analytics
screens.purpose: Data visualization of spending trends and categories.
screens.layout: Header with Monthly picker. Main visual: Skia-based donut chart for category breakdown. Legend below chart. Secondary visual: Bar chart for Income vs Expense. Use neutral/earthy colors for categories, never neon.

screens.name: Budgets
screens.purpose: Tracking monthly budget limits and savings progress.

states.empty: Set up your first budget prompt.

screens.layout: Top tab control: Budgets | Goals. Budgets view: Vertical list of cards with Skia circular progress rings. Over-budget uses warning color. Goals view: Cards with linear progress bars and target amounts.

screens.name: Investments
screens.purpose: Monitor portfolio growth, SIPs, and mutual funds.
screens.layout: Hero header comparing 'Total Invested' to 'Current Value' with absolute gain/loss. Contextual benchmark note (e.g. 'Market is down 2%...'). Asset List using collapsible accordions (Equities, MFs) with sparkline charts on each row.

screens.name: Settings
screens.purpose: App preferences, currency configuration, and data management.
screens.layout: Grouped list rows. Each row has a `brandTertiary` tinted icon container on the left, title, and right chevron. Includes toggles for Theme and clear data options.

hero_bg.alt: Abstract textured background for wealth card

investments_empty.alt: Bitcoin coins in a plant pot symbolizing growth

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow the color palette. Blue, purple, and indigo are completely banned.
Implement the 3-stop vertical gradient scrim over the `hero_bg` image to ensure text contrast. Text on image MUST be readable.
Use AsyncStorage for all data persistence. Do not add authentication or backend sync.
Currency is strictly INR (₹) across the app.
Investments screen must use sparkline charts and contextual benchmarking for performance. Minimize red colors to reduce panic during losses.
Ensure safe area is respected at every screen root. Content must not hide under notches or navigation bars.
Use Phosphor icons consistently. Tinted icon containers (`brandTertiary` background) are the default for list rows.
Do not use emojis anywhere in the system UI.
Include haptics explicitly using `expo-haptics` mapped to the defined events.
